<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If you&#x27;re unsure which model to use, consider starting with <strong class="font-semibold">Claude Opus 4.6</strong> for the most complex tasks. It is the latest generation model with exceptional performance in coding and reasoning.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">All current Claude models support text and image input, text output, multilingual capabilities, and vision. Models are available via the Claude API, AWS Bedrock, and Google Vertex AI.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Once you&#x27;ve picked a model, <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/get-started">learn how to make your first API call</a>.</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="latest-models-comparison"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button class="inline-flex

  justify-center

  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent

border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Max output</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">128k tokens</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">64k tokens</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">64k tokens</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Reliable knowledge cutoff</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">May 2025<sup>2</sup></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Aug 2025<sup>2</sup></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Feb 2025</td></tr><tr class="border-b-0.5 border-border-400 last:border-b-0"><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200"><strong class="font-semibold">Training data cutoff</strong></td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Aug 2025</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Jan 2026</td><td class="p-2 first:pl-0 last:pr-0 text-text-200">Jul 2025</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><em><sup>1 - See the <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/about-claude/pricing">pricing page</a> for complete pricing information including batch API discounts, prompt caching rates, extended thinking costs, and vision processing fees.</sup></em></p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><em><sup>2 - <strong class="font-semibold">Reliable knowledge cutoff</strong> indicates the date through which a model&#x27;s knowledge is most extensive and reliable. <strong class="font-semibold">Training data cutoff</strong> is the broader date range of training data used. For more information, see <a class="inline-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.anthropic.com/transparency">Anthropic&#x27;s Transparency Hub</a>.</sup></em></p>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><div style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 2.5a7.5 7.5 0 1 1 0 15 7.5 7.5 0 0 1 0-15m0 1a6.5 6.5 0 1 0 0 13 6.5 6.5 0 0 0 0-13m.1 5.51a.5.5 0 0 1 .4.49v3h1a.5.5 0 0 1 0 1h-3a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1h1V10h-1a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1H10zM10 6.5A.75.75 0 1 1 10 8a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.5"></path></svg></div></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10">Models with the same snapshot date (e.g., 20240620) are identical across all platforms and do not change. The snapshot date in the model name ensures consistency and allows developers to rely on stable performance across different environments.</div></div>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><div style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 2.5a7.5 7.5 0 1 1 0 15 7.5 7.5 0 0 1 0-15m0 1a6.5 6.5 0 1 0 0 13 6.5 6.5 0 0 0 0-13m.1 5.51a.5.5 0 0 1 .4.49v3h1a.5.5 0 0 1 0 1h-3a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1h1V10h-1a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1H10zM10 6.5A.75.75 0 1 1 10 8a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.5"></path></svg></div></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10">Starting with <strong class="font-semibold">Claude Sonnet 4.5 and all subsequent models</strong> (including Claude Sonnet 4.6), AWS Bedrock and Google Vertex AI offer two endpoint types: <strong class="font-semibold">global endpoints</strong> (dynamic routing for maximum availability) and <strong class="font-semibold">regional endpoints</strong> (guaranteed data routing through specific geographic regions). For more information, see the <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/about-claude/pricing#third-party-platform-pricing">third-party platform pricing section</a>.</div></div>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-border-200 bg-bg-200 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-text-000"><div style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12.5 17a.5.5 0 0 1 0 1h-5a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1zM10 2a6 6 0 0 1 4.081 10.398l-.242.213c-.512.427-.839.964-.839 1.513V15.5a.5.5 0 0 1-.5.5h-5a.5.5 0 0 1-.5-.5v-1.376c0-.48-.25-.951-.656-1.348l-.183-.165A6 6 0 0 1 10 2m0 1a5 5 0 0 0-3.2 8.843l.237.213c.537.523.963 1.234.963 2.068V15h1.5v-3.793L7.146 8.854l-.064-.079a.5.5 0 0 1 .693-.693l.079.064L10 10.293l2.146-2.147.079-.064a.5.5 0 0 1 .693.693l-.064.079-2.354 2.353V15H12v-.876c0-.953.557-1.746 1.2-2.281l.2-.178A5 5 0 0 0 10 3"></path></svg></div></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-text-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-text-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-text-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-text-000 [&amp;_code]:bg-text-000/10"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">You can query model capabilities and token limits programmatically with the <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/api/models/list">Models API</a>. The response includes <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">max_input_tokens</code>, <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">max_tokens</code>, and a <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">capabilities</code> object for every available model.</p></div></div>
<div class="rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-border-300 my-6" data-orientation="vertical"><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden [&amp;:not(:first-child)]:border-t border-border-300"><h3 data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed" class="flex"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_5eslfiuqkntiuuljb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_1eslfiuqkntiuuljb_" class="group w-full flex items-center gap-2 p-4 text-left transparent hover:bg-bg-300 focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-accent-100 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50" data-radix-collection-item=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="text-text-500 transition-transform duration-200 flex-shrink-0 group-data-[state=&#x27;open&#x27;]:rotate-90" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M181.66,133.66l-80,80a8,8,0,0,1-11.32-11.32L164.69,128,90.34,53.66a8,8,0,0,1,11.32-11.32l80,80A8,8,0,0,1,181.66,133.66Z"></path></svg><span class="font-semibold text-text-100 flex-1 font-ui">Legacy models</span></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_5eslfiuqkntiuuljb_" hidden="" role="region" aria-labelledby="accordion-legacy-models" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden" style="--radix-accordion-content-height:var(--radix-collapsible-content-height);--radix-accordion-content-width:var(--radix-collapsible-content-width)"></div></div></div>
<h2 class="font-heading leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="prompt-and-output-performance"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" title="Copy link to clipboard" data-state="closed"><div class="inline" style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="inline" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13.623 9.648a.5.5 0 0 1 .648.281l1.008 2.559a4 4 0 0 1-7.363 3.122l-.08-.19-1.008-2.558a.5.5 0 0 1 .93-.367l1.008 2.558a3 3 0 1 0 5.583-2.198l-1.008-2.559a.5.5 0 0 1 .282-.648M8.9 7.208a.5.5 0 0 1 .649.283l1.833 4.652a.5.5 0 0 1-.931.366L8.619 7.857a.5.5 0 0 1 .281-.649M7.17 2.253a4 4 0 0 1 4.994 2.327l1.008 2.558a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366l-1.009-2.558a3 3 0 0 0-5.582 2.199L6.66 9.704a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366L4.72 7.51a4 4 0 0 1 2.255-5.187z"></path></svg></div></button></div><div>Prompt and output performance</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Claude 4 models excel in:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Performance</strong>: Top-tier results in reasoning, coding, multilingual tasks, long-context handling, honesty, and image processing. See the <a class="inline-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="http://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-4">Claude 4 blog post</a> for more information.</p>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Engaging responses</strong>: Claude models are ideal for applications that require rich, human-like interactions.</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">If you prefer more concise responses, you can adjust your prompts to guide the model toward the desired output length. Refer to the <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/prompt-engineering">prompt engineering guides</a> for details.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">For prompting best practices, see the <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/build-with-claude/prompt-engineering/claude-prompting-best-practices">prompting best practices guide</a>.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Output quality</strong>: When migrating from previous model generations to Claude 4, you may notice larger improvements in overall performance.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="font-heading leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="migrating-to-claude-4-6"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" title="Copy link to clipboard" data-state="closed"><div class="inline" style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="inline" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13.623 9.648a.5.5 0 0 1 .648.281l1.008 2.559a4 4 0 0 1-7.363 3.122l-.08-.19-1.008-2.558a.5.5 0 0 1 .93-.367l1.008 2.558a3 3 0 1 0 5.583-2.198l-1.008-2.559a.5.5 0 0 1 .282-.648M8.9 7.208a.5.5 0 0 1 .649.283l1.833 4.652a.5.5 0 0 1-.931.366L8.619 7.857a.5.5 0 0 1 .281-.649M7.17 2.253a4 4 0 0 1 4.994 2.327l1.008 2.558a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366l-1.009-2.558a3 3 0 0 0-5.582 2.199L6.66 9.704a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366L4.72 7.51a4 4 0 0 1 2.255-5.187z"></path></svg></div></button></div><div>Migrating to Claude 4.6</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If you&#x27;re currently using older Claude models, consider migrating to Claude Opus 4.6 to take advantage of improved intelligence and enhanced capabilities. For detailed migration instructions, see <a class="inline-link" href="/docs/en/about-claude/models/migration-guide">Migrating to Claude 4.6</a>.</p>
<h2 class="font-heading leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="get-started-with-claude"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" title="Copy link to clipboard" data-state="closed"><div class="inline" style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="inline" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13.623 9.648a.5.5 0 0 1 .648.281l1.008 2.559a4 4 0 0 1-7.363 3.122l-.08-.19-1.008-2.558a.5.5 0 0 1 .93-.367l1.008 2.558a3 3 0 1 0 5.583-2.198l-1.008-2.559a.5.5 0 0 1 .282-.648M8.9 7.208a.5.5 0 0 1 .649.283l1.833 4.652a.5.5 0 0 1-.931.366L8.619 7.857a.5.5 0 0 1 .281-.649M7.17 2.253a4 4 0 0 1 4.994 2.327l1.008 2.558a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366l-1.009-2.558a3 3 0 0 0-5.582 2.199L6.66 9.704a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366L4.72 7.51a4 4 0 0 1 2.255-5.187z"></path></svg></div></button></div><div>Get started with Claude</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h2>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If you&#x27;re ready to start exploring what Claude can do for you, dive in! Whether you&#x27;re a developer looking to integrate Claude into your applications or a user wanting to experience the power of AI firsthand, the following resources can help.</p>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><div style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 2.5a7.5 7.5 0 1 1 0 15 7.5 7.5 0 0 1 0-15m0 1a6.5 6.5 0 1 0 0 13 6.5 6.5 0 0 0 0-13m.1 5.51a.5.5 0 0 1 .4.49v3h1a.5.5 0 0 1 0 1h-3a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1h1V10h-1a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1H10zM10 6.5A.75.75 0 1 1 10 8a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.5"></path></svg></div></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10">Looking to chat with Claude? Visit <a class="inline-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="http://www.claude.ai">claude.ai</a>!</div></div>
<div class="grid gap-4 my-8 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3"><a class="flex items-start not-prose relative border border-border-300 rounded-xl bg-transparent overflow-hidden w-full min-h-[120px] hover:bg-bg-200 transition-colors cursor-pointer no-underline text-sm" href="/docs/en/intro"><div class="flex flex-col gap-3 px-5 py-5 w-full items-start"><div><div class="text-text-300" style="flex-shrink:0" class="text-text-300" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15.188 5.11a.5.5 0 0 1 .752.626l-.056.084-7.5 9a.5.5 0 0 1-.738.033l-3.5-3.5-.064-.078a.501.501 0 0 1 .693-.693l.078.064 3.113 3.113 7.15-8.58z"></path></svg></div></div><div class="w-full"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><div class="font-medium text-base text-text-100 font-ui">Intro to Claude</div></div><div class="mt-1 block text-sm text-text-300 line-clamp-2 overflow-hidden break-words"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Explore Claude&#x27;s capabilities and development flow.</p></div></div></div></a><a class="flex items-start not-prose relative border border-border-300 rounded-xl bg-transparent overflow-hidden w-full min-h-[120px] hover:bg-bg-200 transition-colors cursor-pointer no-underline text-sm" href="/docs/en/get-started"><div class="flex flex-col gap-3 px-5 py-5 w-full items-start"><div><div class="text-text-300" style="flex-shrink:0" class="text-text-300" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8.958 2.63c.973-1.311 3.042-.345 2.663 1.242L10.634 8h4.379c1.232 0 1.939 1.404 1.205 2.393l-5.176 6.977c-.973 16.36c-.127.53.563.851.887.414l5.176-6.976A.5.5 0 0 0 15.013 9H10a.5.5 0 0 1-.486-.616z"></path></svg></div></div><div class="w-full"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><div class="font-medium text-base text-text-100 font-ui">Quickstart</div></div><div class="mt-1 block text-sm text-text-300 line-clamp-2 overflow-hidden break-words"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Learn how to make your first API call in minutes.</p></div></div></div></a><a class="flex items-start not-prose relative border border-border-300 rounded-xl bg-transparent overflow-hidden w-full min-h-[120px] hover:bg-bg-200 transition-colors cursor-pointer no-underline text-sm" href="/"><div class="flex flex-col gap-3 px-5 py-5 w-full items-start"><div><div class="text-text-300" 3.5.072.078a.5.5 0 0 1-.072.674l-4 3.5-.082.059a.5.5 0 0 1-.645-.738l.069-.073L16.74 10l-3.57-3.124a.5.5 0 0 1-.047-.705m-6.871-.106a.5.5 0 0 1 .645.738l-.069.073L3.26 10l3.57 3.124a.5.5 0 1 1-.658.752l-4-3.5-.072-.078a.5.5 0 0 1 .072-.674l4-3.5z"></path></svg></div></div><div class="w-full"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><div class="font-medium text-base text-text-100 font-ui">Claude Console</div></div><div class="mt-1 block text-sm text-text-300 line-clamp-2 overflow-hidden break-words"><p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Craft and test powerful prompts directly in your browser.</p></div></div></div></a></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If you have any questions or need assistance, don&#x27;t hesitate to reach out to the <a class="inline-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://support.claude.com/">support team</a> or consult the <a class="inline-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.anthropic.com/discord">Discord community</a>.</p><div class="not-prose mt-8 border-t border-border-300 pt-6"><p class="text-text-200 text-sm font-medium">Was this page helpful?</p><div class="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2"><button class="inline-flex
